title: Marinated Chicken Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful stir fry recipe with marinated chicken and peanuts.

ingredients.name: marinated sauce (soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, garlic)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced bell peppers and onions to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the peanuts to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Return the cooked chicken to the skillet and stir in the marinated sauce and soy sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
